overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character running through Night City's neon-lit downtown streets at night. The character navigates from a narrow alley through an underpass, across a busy intersection with traffic, and along covered walkways with dense vertical neon signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow alley between green concrete buildings

events.description: jogger in yellow shirt runs past the camera from left to right
camera passes the large illuminated billboard on the right side

agents.ego_description: running through narrow alleyway between green concrete buildings with circular windows

notable_agents.action: jogger in yellow shirt and black shorts running past the camera

entered.detail: tall green concrete industrial building with weathered facade
illuminated circular windows on the building facade
large vertical digital billboard displaying advertisements with bright white light
trash and papers scattered across the concrete ground

segments.scene_description: The character runs through a narrow alley flanked by a green concrete building with circular windows on the left. A jogger in yellow passes by in the opposite direction. The camera moves past a large illuminated billboard on the right as it approaches a concrete overpass ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete underpass with red neon strip lighting

events.description: entering the covered underpass area with red neon strips overhead
exiting the underpass and approaching street level with visible traffic

agents.ego_description: running through the underpass beneath the elevated highway structure

entered.detail: massive concrete overpass structure spanning across the path ahead
horizontal red neon light strips mounted on the underpass ceiling
thick cylindrical concrete pillars supporting the overpass

segments.scene_description: The character enters a concrete underpass illuminated by red neon strips overhead. The space is enclosed by thick support pillars on the right and opens ahead to street level where sparse traffic is visible. The green building and billboard from the alley fall behind as the character moves forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy urban intersection beneath elevated highway

events.description: beginning to cross the street at the marked crosswalk
vehicles including cars and a truck pass through the intersection
camera tilts upward to look at the tall skyscrapers and billboards

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide street at a crosswalk while navigating through moderate traffic

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white shirt and gray pants walking ahead on the crosswalk
black car driving through the intersection with headlights on

entered.detail: red and white painted zebra crossing lines on the asphalt
tall red pole with traffic signals and crosswalk lights
tall buildings covered with large illuminated advertisements and Japanese text
elevated highway structure with vehicles passing overhead

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the underpass into a wide urban intersection, crossing the street at a marked crosswalk. A pedestrian in white walks ahead while cars pass through the intersection. The camera tilts up to reveal towering skyscrapers covered in bright billboards beneath the elevated highway.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk under elevated highway with storefronts

events.description: passing the illuminated pawn shop storefront on the left
passing pedestrians walking along the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: running along the sidewalk beneath the overpass passing by storefronts and pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white shirt walking ahead under the overpass
person standing near the pawn shop entrance

entered.detail: yellow storefront with green neon PAWN SHOP signage and metal security grating
black metal railings separating the sidewalk from the street below
tall modern street lamps illuminating the walkway

segments.scene_description: The character continues along a sidewalk beneath the elevated highway, passing a yellow pawn shop with green neon signage on the left. Metal railings line the right side separating the walkway from the street. Other pedestrians are visible ahead and walking in the opposite direction as the character moves deeper under the overpass.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with dense vertical neon signage

events.description: passing under brighter vertical neon signs illuminating the walkway

agents.ego_description: running through the covered walkway surrounded by dense neon advertisements

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white shirt walking ahead into the covered distance

entered.detail: tall vertical neon signs with Japanese characters and bright colors
solid concrete roof completely covering the walkway
multi-story building facade with illuminated windows

segments.scene_description: The character enters a fully covered walkway where the sky is no longer visible. Dense vertical neon signs with Japanese characters line the right side, casting colorful light on the path ahead. The pedestrian in white continues walking ahead in the distance as the character moves through this neon-lit corridor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a narrow urban alleyway into a dense, neon-saturated corridor beneath the city's infrastructure. It begins by trailing a character past a green concrete building and an illuminated billboard, moving quickly through the alley before entering a concrete underpass lit by red neon strips. As the character emerges from the underpass, the scene opens into a wide intersection with passing traffic and a view of towering skyscrapers beneath an elevated highway. The camera then follows the character along a sidewalk past a yellow pawn shop and metal railings, gradually shifting from the open street into a fully covered walkway. Finally, the environment transforms into a claustrophobic neon-lit corridor where the sky vanishes, replaced by dense vertical signs with Japanese characters that cast colorful light across the path.
